_comment: Provenance + licensing for every visual/audio asset, mirroring source-register.json. No asset ships without an entry here and a confirmed commercial-use license. AI-generated art is auxiliary and must record its model, prompt reference, and a human confirmation of ownership/commercial terms.

assets.license: PENDING — confirm ByteDance/Seedream commercial-use + output-ownership terms before ship
assets.usage: Salón room — flooring module, before state (room texture, shipped as WebP)
assets.limitations: Auxiliary AI art. Not a source of truth. Ships in-game but licence is still PENDING — a release blocker until confirmed.

assets.usage: Salón room — flooring module, after state (room texture, shipped as WebP)
assets.limitations: Pixel-aligned edit of salon-floor-before (only the floor changes). Licence PENDING — release blocker.

assets.usage: Salón room — lighting module, before state (new floor already laid, poor lighting)
assets.limitations: Must be an edit of salon-floor-after so the new floor persists (cumulative room state). Only the lighting differs.

assets.usage: Salón room — lighting module, after state; also the room's fully-renovated tile art
assets.limitations: Pixel-aligned edit of salon-light-before (only the lighting changes). Show only the finished result — never wiring, tools, or how-to.

assets.usage: Dormitorio room — paint module, before state
assets.limitations: Reuse the locked style bible for cross-room consistency; bedroom with tired/dull walls.

assets.usage: Dormitorio room — paint module, after state
assets.limitations: Pixel-aligned edit of dormitorio-paint-before (only the wall colour/freshness changes).

approvedFreeSources.name: Kenney
approvedFreeSources.license: CC0 (public domain, commercial OK, no attribution required)
